verses.text: Hihte pen, siampi Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua, leh Israel minam sung pan beh lutangte in amaute tungah a piak, Kanaan gamsungah Israel mite' ngah gamhte ahi hi
Minam kua leh alangte-a' dingin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amau' gamhte aisanna tawh kipia hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Jordan galkhatah minam nih leh alangte tungah gamh pia khinzo hi. Ahih hangin amaute lakah Levi mite tungah bangmah pialo hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Josef mite minam nihin kikhen a, Manasseh leh Efraim minamte ahi uh hi. Tua gam sungah Levi-te tungah tanh kipialo a, ahih hangin amau' ten'na ding khuapite leh a ganhingte uh-a' dingin a lonona gamte tawh kipia bek hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, amaute in leitang a hawm uh hi.

Tua ciangin Judah minamte Gilgal-a Joshua kiangah pai uh a, amaute sung panin Kenaz mi Jefunneh tapa Kaleb in ama kiangah, “ Topa in Kadeshbarnea-ah Pasian mi Moses tungah nang leh kei' thu tawh kisai a gente na thei hi
A gamsung thukansim dingin Topa' nasem Moses in Kadeshbarnea panin kei hong sawl lai-in kum sawmli ka pha a, ka lungsima om bangin ama kiangah thu ka tun'kik hi
Ahih hangin kei tawh hong paito khawm ka sanggamte in mite lungkiasak uh a, ahi zongin keimah in lungsim tak tawh Topa ka Pasian ka zui hi
Tua ni-in Moses kiciamin, ‘Nangmah in Topa ka Pasian, lungsim tak tawh zui na hih manin na khe in a totsa leitang pen nang leh na tate-a' dingin gamh hi tawntung ding hi,’ hong ci hi
Tu-in, a cihsa bangin Topa in, Israel mite sehnel gamah a pai sung, Topa in hih thu Moses tungah a gen-a kipan hih kum sawmlilenga sung kei hong nungtasak a, tu-in kei kum sawmgiatlenga ka pha hi
Moses in hong sawl hun lai mah bangin tuni-in kei ka tha hat lai a, galdona ding, leh kuankhiatna leh ciahkikna dingin ka thatang pen tua hun lai-a ka thatang mah bang lai hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in tua ni-a Topa' gen hih mualtung gam kei hong pia in. Anak mite a muan'huai mahmah khuapi sungah a omna thu tua hun lai-in kong gen uh hi. Topa in kei hong ompih ding a, Topa' cih mah bangin amaute ka hawlkhiazo khading hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in amah thupha pia a, Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb tungah gamh-in Hebron a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in Topa, Israel-te' Pasian, lungsimtak tawh zui ahih manin tuni dongin Hebron pen Kenaz mi Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb' gamh a suak hi
Hih Hebron min a nidangin Kiriatharba kici hi; Arba pen Anak mite lakah mi lianpen khat ahi hi. Tua ciangin galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi.
